productDisplayName: Allen Solly Kids Boys Red T-shirt
description: Style Note A dress-up tee for the little man who's following his dad's footsteps, stylish to a T and super comfy. Just right for his springtime escapades, this feather light t-shirt is crafted from luxe cotton (so he can get into trouble, in comfort) and is as classic as it gets! Product Details Red and blue sleeveless t-shirt that has a round neck, graphic and rubber print on the front, embroidery above the left hem and stitch detailing Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron do not iron on decorations
